plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP collection template for Grandstream GWN wireless devices (interface traffic + uptime, enterprise PEN 42397). Collects IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface counters (ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, ifXTable) rates and device uptime (sysUpTime). The GRANDSTREAM-GWN-MIB is oriented to wireless radio statistics and per-client information — it exposes only gwnDeviceUptime as a scalar system object and has no CPU/memory/temperature objects, while associated clients appear only as the per-MAC gwnClientTable with no scalar count, which telegraf inputs.snmp cannot aggregate row-wise. CPU/memory/temperature/client-count/channel-utilization are therefore N/A and not faked. Applicable to Grandstream GWN76xx/GWN78xx Wi-Fi access points and controllers (enterprise PEN 42397) and other IF-MIB compliant wireless AP devices.
name: Wireless

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the wireless device since the last restart, derived from sysUpTime. Monitoring uptime helps administrators understand device stability and identify unexpected reboots.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_total_incoming_traffic
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of total bytes received by the entire wireless device over the past 5 minutes, summed across all interfaces from the 64-bit ifHCInOctets counter.

metrics.name: device_total_outgoing_traffic
metrics.description: This metric represents the average rate of total bytes sent by the entire wireless device over the past 5 minutes, summed across all interfaces from the 64-bit ifHCOutOctets counter.
